exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your dance training forward
items: Assess your current physical fitness level by completing a basic dance readiness evaluation including balance, flexibility, and coordination tests
Schedule a one-on-one consultation with a qualified dance instructor to assess your body alignment and establish proper foundational positioning
Research and visit 3-5 dance studios in your area to observe different teaching styles and class atmospheres
Identify and define your specific dance training goals by writing down 3-5 concrete objectives
Schedule a beginner-friendly class trial or introductory package at your chosen studio
Assess your current physical condition and schedule a fitness evaluation or physical therapy consultation
